reviews.review_description: Jumped out of my seat many times during game play.  Well written and fun to play.

I'm not really big on VR games, but THIS is fun! Soooooo scary and creepy, and very well done. My only complaint is that my Galaxy S7 overheats and forces me out of the game to "cool down" after only 5 mins or so of play. This is the only game/app this has happened to me on so far. I still give Dark Days 5 stars though, I want more games this good!
An actual VR game and not just a tech demo.  Surprisingly easy to control without a controller and very immersive.  I only suggest buying if you have a lot of spare changes of underwear though.

reviews.review_title: I'm probably gonna have a stroke but...
reviews.review_description: That just speaks to how good this game is. I'm trapped in the bunker now and finally was able to find the key and get the ID card out of the little box and i was chased down by the ghost demon several times before he finally got me because he was hiding behind the door. I still freak out and scream every time when I'm trying to run so my hubby and kids hate being around me while I'm playing it but even though I'm scared out of my mind, i cannot stop playing. The puzzles are addicting and i am so impressed. If you die, the clues will change and they won't be in the same place you have been looking. This is a great game. I, myself am not much of a gamer, but this is super fun and it hasn't grown boring at all. Even the shaking of the players veiwpoint when the ghost demon thing sees you... It adds to the angst and urgency. Well done!

reviews.review_title: Great if you like a spooky story!
reviews.review_description: First time I've ever pulled my oculus off my head in panic at a game before. Really well done, controls smooth and feels a bit like a point and click adventure. It goes for the jump scare though, but it does it well!

Hey braybould, when you’re trying to crouch, are you sliding your thumb “down” on the controller pad (the flat area above the buttons)? It took me forever to figure that out. Otherwise I LOVE this game! Great puzzles, mechanics, and narrative! I can’t wait to see what else this game developer puts out!
I really like this game ol memories of silent hill

Can't get past the RV scene. The door key does not appear in the overhead bin, and can't find it anywhere else in the RV. Playing on Oculus Go.

Can the devs please address this? I will change my review if it gets fixed and I can finish the game.
This is an awesome game so far. The only thing is I’m stuck in the hotel room because I cannot crouch, it’s not working. I’m playing on the Oculus Go. If anyone has pointers I’m all ears.
So good looks good plays good the game is good I did get stuck but I cheated and you tubed it lol

with oculus go it tells me to push the back button twice to terurn to the menu, but when i do this, it will not go back to the menu for me...
Also i got stuck looking for the key in the hotel room and have looked everywhere for over 1 hour without finding it... perhaps it is bugged.

update: after quitting the game and starting again the key was there, i have played a good bit longer and have to say i really like the game. Graphics are on point and the game (and story) gets better after playing for a while.
Great vr game I hope there is more game like this
Best game I've seen on Gear VR. Scary, intelligent and humorous.
This game will leave you jumping g and screaming ! I absolutely love it
Once you start the game there’s no way to start a new game. It just continues where you left off

developer_response.body: In the main menu (the desk) you can look under and find a garbage. This is the way to restart a new game! Thanks for playing Dark Days!

reviews.review_description: Don’t get me wrong, this is one of my favorite games on the Go!  I had hoped the storyline was a little longer. Also would be nice if there were more ways for the creepy factor to come into play. For me the most startling was near the opening and then it began to become predictable which lost some creepy factors. Looking forward to more!  A nice addition would being able to have another player in there with you too.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your comment rubiks! The idea of a second player is really cool, quite hard to update in this game but it's something we would really like to do in a new adventure game!

reviews.review_description:
My first horror game and I love it, fell off my chair twice trying to hide 🤣 would well recommend this game for all you who love horror movies and puzzle solving, took me a few hours to get into it but well worth the time
Would love recommendations of more like this.

Thank you!
new with this game... how can I exit with receptionist... don’t know what to do.

developer_response.body: You have to find your ID card, and give it to him! Search maybe in your car?..

reviews.review_description: So scary! I actually couldn’t play it unless my fiancé was home. Really fun and made you think a lot. Some areas of the game were harder than others, I did get stuck a few times and need some help for a walkthrough video online. I really enjoyed my time playing. The end is heartbreaking but falls inline with the whole messed up storyline. !!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the great comments, and to have finished our game :-) Thanks also to your fiancé to have been with you all the time^^

reviews.review_description:
So it is a great game so far, but i cant progress at all after I put in coins in the lanudry room. I can press buttons two and five but not four. I have seen the exit in the back of the machine but I can’t open it. That is the only thing keeping this from being five stars. any help is  appreciated, I am using the Oculus Go.

Edit: I have found all three coins, i have put them in. I can’t press the 4th button, the dot in the center dosn’t change when I am over the 4th button.

developer_response.body: Hi there, in this room, try to find the 3 coins to unlock the washing machine. (look around the arcade machine and in the room..)
